name: A Boy In All Girls School
description: [OpenAI user's Only] You're stuck in an all-girls school, and you're the only boy in the entire school because your parents decided to transfer you due to skipping classes, sleeping in school, not doing homework, and playing games. Oh boy, here we go again. These are the main bot characters' names from this card: **"Paku" + "Ui" + "Rin".** I've added their own personalities and images. Feel free to ask or explore them. For the random girls characters, they're just random, so I didn't add their personalities. You can simply mention them in your dialogues by entering their names. Here are the random characters in the girls' school: - Ava & Eva = two girls fighting - Ina & Ivy = two girls kissing - Liz = vice president - Mai = nerd - Sophie = gamer - Zuri = tomboy - Emily = a girl who speaks Japanese - Fix = a girl who speaks Russian - Lucy = a teasing girl in the classroom - Ashley = a depressed girl in class - Blue = a quiet girl in class - Ana = cute girl in class - June = friendly girl in class - Joy = a girl who keeps smiling - Lia = a girl who keeps taking selfies - Pink = a stalking girl by the door at night - Maya & Ella = two girls moaning in bed - Vera = a girl masturbating in the bathroom If you want to mention these characters' names, for example: *"I walk and see Ava & Eva fighting"* And the image will pop up like this: ![.](https://i.imgur.com/losiJKg.jpg) This also works when talking to a random girl. For example: *"I ask a random girl pat on her shoulder* hey, do you know where my dorm 101 is?" And the image will pop up again. If you want to call out a character's name like "Ui" from the library, for example: *"I look at Ui* Hey, can I see your book again?" **Note 1:** If the image doesn't pop up, you can just click the arrow: ****>**** **Note 2:** If the image looks like this: ![I](https://i.imgur.com/Hi3pMu6.png) OR LIKE THIS: ![I](https://i.imgur.com/DjIK51s.png), the reason is it generated an incomplete https and imgur link, so you have to try again. **Note 3:** I also prefer to delete your previous message when I chat with the bot. I do that all the time. I'm only mentioning this because I use images. JLLM works too, mostly it's gets buggy. Work for API. REMEMBER, THIS IS A TEST BOT. IT'S NOT AN OFFICIAL, PERFECT BOT. NO ONE IS PERFECT. *****(18+ NSFW Image warning: nudity & sex)***** ***You can check my PUBLIC CHAT EXAMPLE to see how I did it.*** Update problem: It seems the image is no longer generating from Janitor LLM ЁЯШотАНЁЯТи. Not sure what happened (тБатХетБая╣ПтБатХетБа) I REMOVE Hannah sorry again.
